name: orbit
description: Orbit — Complete UAT for WordPress plugins. Dev, QA, PM, Designer, and End User perspectives — one command, every release.

scripts.uat: npx playwright test --config=tests/playwright/playwright.config.js --project=video --reporter=line && python3 scripts/generate-uat-report.py --title 'UAT Report' --snaps reports/screenshots/flows-compare --videos reports/videos --out reports/uat-report.html && npx open-cli reports/uat-report.html
scripts.uat:ci: npx playwright test --config=tests/playwright/playwright.config.js --project=video --reporter=line && python3 scripts/generate-uat-report.py --title 'UAT Report' --snaps reports/screenshots/flows-compare --videos reports/videos --out reports/uat-report.html
